data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. ASTON FUMIKO sprung the lids and led but ran over and filled the minor money when second (22.32) at Warrnambool in Grade 5. Failed to fire only run here. Has performed well from this box with a win and three minor placings to her name from eight starts. Likely to feature again. 1. HOLYFIELD CHIC finds it hard to break through. Finished in the money last time though when second (22.58) at this track. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings two times from three starts. Can measure up. 3. ROOSTER LEGS was a last-start winner from the inside at this track and distance (22.56), scoring by half a length. Leading player again. 2. JADED SMILE has top-three aspirations after placing here over this journey last time.","runners":[7,1,3,2],"exclusive":false}
